This '''Sullustan Jedi''' was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who had survived [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]]. He fell victim to the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] when [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] killed him in the [[Battle of Shumari]] in which [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces clashed with a group of Jedi survivors. The Sullustan Jedi wielded a green [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

==Behind the scenes==
This individual only appears in the story ''[[Perfect Evil]]'', which spanned [[Star Wars comic books|issues]] [[Star Wars Manga: Black|Black]] and [[Star Wars Manga: Silver|Silver]] of [[Tokyopop's Star Wars Manga|''Star Wars Manga'']]. Originally published in Japan, those stories were considered to be of "fuzzy" continuity by Lucasfilm.<ref>{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=980#15895005|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2006-11-06|time=6:03 PM}}</ref> Since then, they have been republished in English in the United Kingdom under [[Infinities]] label, which established the material in them as non-[[canon]]ical. The planet [[Shumari]] has been later referenced in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', which included the [[Shumari system/Legends|Shumari system]] in its appendix. However, according to [[Jason Fry]], "its inclusion shouldn't be taken as a statement of canonicity for anything except the geography."<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/29648348|board=Literature|thread=The Essential Atlas and Galactic Cartography: Official Discussion|user=[[Jason Fry|jasonfry]]|date=2009-01-04|time=7:52 AM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200714135715/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-essential-atlas-and-galactic-cartography-official-discussion.21938930/page-72}}</ref>
